pi_items.source: task.json description: 'Save the completed drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/truss_elevation.dxf'
task.json description specifies four layers: Chords (Red), Webs (Green), Dimensions (Cyan), Labels (White)

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic Warren truss elevation drawing in LibreCAD with a 12-meter span (12000 mm), 2000 mm height, 6 equal panels, and 4 required layers (Chords, Webs, Dimensions, Labels). The drawing must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/truss_elevation.dxf. The verifier checks for DXF validity, layer presence, geometric elements (chords, diagonals, vertical ends), and annotations (title 'WARREN TRUSS ELEVATION', scale '1:100', support labels 'PIN' and 'ROLLER').
